title: Murati Ships an Open Model to Rival Chinese Open Weights - TCR 07/16/26
description:
NOTE: metadata reconstructed manually on 2026-07-17; yt-dlp was bot-blocked for this video (all player clients + Safari cookies). Title/duration/view_count from flat-playlist + oEmbed; content from the companion post at https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-july-16-2026/. Re-run yt-dlp later to replace with the real description if desired.

Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab shipped Inkling, a 975B-parameter open-weights multimodal model (41B active, 1M-token context, trained on 45T tokens, weights on Hugging Face, ~78% FORTRESS / ~99% StrongREJECT), positioned against the Chinese open-weight wave. Weco AI's AIDE-2 agent rewrote its own research code across ~100 unattended steps over 8 days, beating a hand-tuned baseline and cutting reward-hacking from ~63% to 34% of runs. PrismML compressed a 27B reasoner (Bonsai) to 3.9 GB at an estimated 90-95% capability, running on phones. Demis Hassabis proposed a FINRA-style independent standards body to review frontier models before release. Apple Intelligence cleared China's Cyberspace Administration and launched on Alibaba's Qwen models, with Greater China sales up 28% to $20.5B. C-CAR031 armored CAR-T therapy regressed tumors in 32 of 36 treatment-refractory liver-cancer patients (44.4% ORR, 14.2-month median OS). OpenAI's GPT-Red self-play red-teamer found a novel fake-chain-of-thought attack (>90% success vs GPT-5, <23% vs GPT-5.6) and out-performed human red-teamers. Microsoft shipped a record 570 security fixes in one patch run, crediting AI-assisted discovery, including two actively exploited zero-days. CENTCOM sent explosive drone boats into combat for the first time, striking an Iranian submarine and the Bandar Abbas naval port. Solar supplied a record 25% of EU electricity in June, becoming the bloc's largest single power source.

Synthesis: capability is decentralizing on three axes at once — open weights diffusing globally, agents authoring their own improvements, and frontier-class releases coming from more founders and nations — while regulatory gates harden at national borders in front of capability that is already downloadable, and private advantage in holding flaws or moats expires as discovery becomes automated and cheap.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-july-16-2026/
